projects.name: PromptOps - Prompt Management Platform
projects.description: A backend-first platform for managing prompt templates like production assets. It supports versioned templates, schema-checked inputs, reusable rendering flows, and export paths for teams experimenting with enterprise AI workflows.

projects.name: Multi-Agentic RAG Research Assistant
projects.description: A retrieval-augmented AI workflow that separates planning, retrieval, answer synthesis, and evaluation into agent-like steps. The project highlights orchestration patterns for more traceable AI assistants.

projects.name: Warranty Claim Anomaly Detection
projects.description: An ML review workspace for surfacing unusual warranty claim patterns. The project combines model-driven anomaly scoring, explainability, and reviewer-friendly interfaces so operations teams can inspect risk signals instead of digging through raw records.

projects.name: Airflow ETL Data Pipeline
projects.description: A scheduled data pipeline for extracting, transforming, and loading structured datasets with repeatable DAG orchestration. It demonstrates workflow design, task dependencies, retries, and data pipeline observability.

projects.name: Stock Forecasting MLOps Pipeline
projects.description: An end-to-end forecasting pipeline that treats model delivery as an engineering problem, not just a notebook result. It includes LSTM training, validation, containerized serving, monitoring hooks, and deployment-ready workflow structure.

projects.name: Intelligent Supply Chain Management System
projects.description: A full-stack supply-chain prototype that brings together inventory tracking, operational workflows, and blockchain-inspired traceability concepts. The project expands the portfolio into product-style systems with multiple moving parts.

projects.name: Spring Boot Microservices Platform
projects.description: A Java backend project focused on decomposing application features into service boundaries, API contracts, and independently deployable Spring Boot services.

projects.name: E-Commerce Recommendation Engine
projects.description: A recommendation-system project for matching shoppers with relevant products using behavioral signals and model-driven ranking. It adds a product analytics angle to the ML work in this portfolio.

projects.name: Online Banking Full-Stack Application
projects.description: A full-stack banking application with Java services and a React/Redux front end, built around account workflows, transaction-style interactions, and modular web application structure.

projects.name: Network Intrusion Detection with Machine Learning
projects.description: A security-focused ML project for classifying suspicious network behavior. It demonstrates feature preparation, model training, and evaluation patterns for cybersecurity analytics.

projects.name: Ad Genius - AI Campaign Assistant
projects.description: A generative AI prototype for producing, scoring, and iterating ad copy. It uses prompt templates, LangChain orchestration, evaluation logic, and a lightweight dashboard to make creative experimentation faster and easier to compare.

projects.name: Image Manipulation and Enhancement App
projects.description: A desktop-style image processing application built around MVC architecture, scripting support, batch operations, undo/redo, and common transformations such as flipping, brightness adjustment, and channel enhancement.
